calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-17-2005 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-17-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: SHAWN K. BANKSON, Esq. (SBN 223638) APPEARS FOR PLAINTIFF HAYES VALLEY LIMITED PARTNERSHIP; JESSICA L. CHYLIK, Esq. APPEARS FOR DEFENDANT WHO IS ALSO PRESENT

THE PARTIES SIGN A STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS:

JUDGMENT WILL BE ENTERED AS FOLLOWS SHOULD DEFENDANT FAIL TO COMPLY WITH ANY OF THE TERMS STATED HEREIN:
DEFENDANT TULLY MORTENSON IS TO REMAIN IN POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES AT 711 HAYES STREET, S.F., CA 94102 PROVIDED THAT DEFENDANT COMPLIES WITH ALL STIPULATED TERMS; THE RENTAL AGREEMENT/LEASE UNDER WHICH DEFENDANT HOLDS POSSESSION OF SAID PROPERTY IS NOT FORFEITED UNLESS DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLY WITH ANY TERM OF THE STIPULATION. PLAINTIFF IS AWARDED $8,736.00 ON OR BEFORE MONDAY, AUGUST 22, 2005 AND $791.30 ON OR BEFORE THURSDAY, SEPTEMBER 1, 2005; DEFENDANT EXPRESSLY WAIVES ANY AND ALL RIGHTS TO A NOTICED MOTION AND/OR RIGHT TO A HEARING ON THE ENTRY OF A JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO THIS STIPULATION; DEFENDANT EXPRESSLY AGREES TO LEAVE THE PREMISES IN GOOD REPAIR AND CLEAN CONDITION ACCORDING TO CALIFORNIA LAW; ANY SECURITY DEPOSIT HELD BY PLAINTIFF WILL BE ACCOUNTED FOR ACCORDING TO CALIFORNIA LAW; COMMENCING SEPTEMBER 1, 2005 RENT WILL BE DUE ACCORDING TO THE LEASE.
NON-COMPLIANCE WITH THIS AGREEMENT WILL BE EVIDENCED BY A WRITTEN DECLARATION BY PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY. UPON ANY NON-COMPLIANCE WITH ANY TERM OF THIS STIPULATION, THE FULL BALANCE AS STATED IN THE DECLARATION OF NON-COMPLIANCE WILL BE DUE AND WRITS FOR POSSESSION WILL BE ISSUED IMMEDIATELY; UPON FULL COMPLIANCE, THIS MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
DEFENDANT'S TELEPHONE NUMBER IS (415)424-2847; NO FURTHER STAYS WILL BE REQUESTED OR GRANTED.
JUDGE PRO TEM IRVING PFEFFER; CLERK: MARJORIE MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED.
